items.title: The more I think about AI agents, the less obvious it is that pricing goes purely consumption-based Token costs matter... but enterprise agents may need identities, roles, auth, budgets, audit logs etc That sounds odd...

items.title_en: The more I think about AI agents, the less obvious it is that pricing goes purely consumption-based Token costs matter... but enterprise agents may need identities, roles, auth, budgets, audit logs etc That sounds odd...
items.title_zh: 我对人工智能代理的思考越多，就越不明显的是，定价纯粹基于消费的代币成本很重要……但企业代理可能需要身份、角色、身份验证、预算、审计日志等，这听起来很奇怪……
